summary: Full e-commerce backend + frontend testing for new TLJ D2C storefront (mega-menu, collections, products, Stripe checkout, admin CRUD). 26/26 backend tests pass. All major frontend flows pass: collections grid + detail, product detail + Add to Bag, cart drawer +/- + remove + Secure Checkout (verified successful redirect to checkout.stripe.com), mega-menu hover with image swap, /admin/menu /admin/products /admin/collections all load, From-Project select present, homepage retains lead-gen wizard and shows home-engagement-section.

issues: React dev console warns: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' — hydration warning from a Shadcn-style select component placing spans inside native <option>. Cosmetic in prod but produces hydration errors in dev. Likely in /admin/menu and /admin/collections editor selects.

passed_tests: GET /api/menu returns mega-menu with Engagement Rings (type=mega, columns, featured_image_url)
GET /api/collections returns 11 collections each with product_count
GET /api/collections/engagement-rings returns collection + 7 products
GET /api/collections/engagement-rings?sort=price_asc and price_desc both order correctly
GET /api/collections/{bad-slug} returns 404
GET /api/products list, filter by collection, filter featured=true, search=oval all work
GET /api/products/oval-hidden-halo-engagement-ring returns product + related[] array
GET /api/products/{bad-slug} returns 404
POST /api/checkout/session with oval-hidden-halo-engagement-ring qty=1 returns Stripe URL + session_id, amount=1450 (server-computed)
Server-side price authority: qty=2 returns amount=2900; invalid product -> 400; empty cart -> 400
GET /api/checkout/status/{session_id} returns payment_status (pending) without error; payment_transactions row created
Admin login + GET /api/admin/products, /api/admin/collections (with product_count), /api/admin/menu, /api/admin/shop-orders
PUT /api/admin/menu persists items (label edit + revert works)
Admin product CRUD: POST creates, GET verifies, PUT updates, public /api/products/{slug} sees it, DELETE removes it (subsequent GET 404)
Admin collection CRUD: POST/PUT/DELETE all 200
POST /api/admin/products/from-project/{project_id} creates a draft product with source_project_id set
Unauth admin request returns 401/403

FRONTEND /collections: collections-grid rendered with 11 collection-card-<slug> tiles; clicking engagement-rings navigates to /collections/engagement-rings showing 7 product cards + collection-sort dropdown

FRONTEND /products/oval-hidden-halo-engagement-ring: add-to-cart-btn opens cart-drawer; cart-subtotal=$1,450; cart-qty-plus updates to $2,900; cart-checkout-btn triggers POST /api/checkout/session and redirects browser to checkout.stripe.com (verified live)
FRONTEND mega-menu: hovering Engagement Rings opens mega-panel-engagement with 8 mega-menu-link items + mega-menu-featured; hovering different sub-links swaps the featured src (unsplash <-> pexels)
FRONTEND /: home-engagement-section present AND the lead-gen wizard form (paste link / attach images / record audio / Get me a quote CTA) remains intact
ADMIN UI: login OK, /admin/menu loads with save-menu-btn, /admin/products loads with New product button + from-project-select, /admin/collections loads the grid of editable collection cards
action_items: LOW: Fix hydration warning 'span cannot be a child of select/option' in admin select components (likely a Shadcn Select wrapping <option><span/></option>). Cosmetic dev-mode noise; does not affect functionality.
INFO: Homepage hero CTA label is 'Get me a quote', not 'Get My Free Quote' as referenced in the spec — wizard still works; verify whether copy update is desired.
critical_code_review_comments: commerce_routes.py /api/checkout/session: STRIPE_API_KEY is read at module import. If env is loaded later, key may be empty and route 503s. Consider reading inside the request or after explicit load_dotenv at top of server.py — current code is fine since server.py imports dotenv first, but worth a defensive note.
commerce_routes.py _slugify is duplicated logic that already likely exists in admin_routes/server.py — DRY candidate.

admin_update_collection rewrites collections.$ via positional update — this only updates the FIRST matching slug per document. If a product is ever in the same collection twice it leaves a stale ref. Use arrayFilters or $[] for safety.

commerce_routes.py: ProductPayload.price has no >=0 validation. Negative price would create a 'free' or negative-amount product; checkout already guards (total<=0 -> 400), but admin create/update should reject negatives explicitly.

commerce_routes.py admin_create_product_from_project blindly trusts proj.price and creates a published=False product with published flag default — OK, but slug collision uses random 4-char suffix; under concurrency two simultaneous calls could still collide. Use a retry loop.
Cart persistence key tlj_cart_v1 in localStorage — verified cart hydrates across reloads. No SSR issue observed.

MegaMenuHeader: the mega-menu-featured anchor is a <button> tag — fine for hover image swap; however, button wrapping an <a>-like nav target should use <Link> or onClick→navigate; verify it actually navigates on click (was not directly tested).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (collections, product detail, cart drawer, Stripe redirect, mega-menu hover+image swap, admin pages load)

test_credentials: Admin: ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709. Stripe sk_test_emergent (test mode). Test buyer email: TEST_buyer@example.com.
seed_data_creation: Created during testing: 2 payment_transactions (pending state, qty=1 and qty=2 of oval-hidden-halo-engagement-ring), 2 transient admin Products (TEST_Product/TEST_Updated — deleted), 1 transient admin Collection (TEST_Coll — deleted), 1 transient product-from-project (deleted), 1 transient menu label edit (reverted).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All commerce backend endpoints are green via pytest /app/backend/tests/test_commerce.py (26 tests, ~3.4s). Frontend storefront fully functional end-to-end including live Stripe redirect. Only outstanding nit is a dev-mode React hydration warning for span-in-option inside admin selects (cosmetic). The lead-gen wizard on / still works alongside the new home-engagement-section. Use products: oval-hidden-halo-engagement-ring (price 1450), round-solitaire-engagement-ring, diamond-eternity-wedding-band; collections: engagement-rings, round-engagement-rings, wedding-bands.
rca_of_issue: No blocking issues. Span-in-option hydration warning: a Shadcn-style Select wraps each option's label in <span>, but native <option> only accepts text — replace span wrapper with raw text or switch the admin selects to a fully Radix-based listbox (non-native).
